reviews.comment:
Linda estacion. Mercado con lo justo y necesario. La atencion es destacada, super serviciales. Destaco que se puede abonar con APP YPF ya que la utilizo y aprovecho descuentos.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful station. Market with just the essentials. The service is outstanding, super helpful. I'd like to highlight that you can pay with the YPF app, as I use it and take advantage of discounts.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18090789075875574973/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHOE5tQ0N3EAE
